core.name: ChartOptions
core.typeSignature: type ChartOptions<TOptions> = TOptions;

core.name: ChartAnimationOptions
core.description: Fully resolved chart animation options.

core.name: ChartTitleOptions
core.description: Fully resolved chart title options.

core.name: ChartPadding
core.description: Chart padding with explicit top, right, bottom, and left values.

core.name: ChartArea
core.description: The computed drawing area of a chart after padding is applied.

core.name: BaseChartOptions
core.description: Base options shared by all chart types.

core.name: Chart
core.description: Abstract base class for all chart types, providing scene, renderer, animation, color management, and lifecycle.
core.typeSignature: class Chart<TOptions extends BaseChartOptions, TEventMap extends EventMap = EventMap> extends EventBus<TEventMap>

members.name: update
members.description: Merges partial options into the current options and re-renders if `autoRender` is enabled.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Destroys the chart, its scene, context, and cleans up all event subscriptions.

members.name: has
members.description: Returns whether there are any listeners registered for the given event type.

members.name: on
members.description: Subscribes a handler to the given event type and returns a disposable for cleanup.

members.name: off
members.description: Removes a previously registered handler for the given event type.

members.name: once
members.description: Subscribes a handler that is automatically removed after it fires once.

members.name: emit
members.description: Emits an event, invoking all matching handlers and bubbling to the parent if applicable.

members.name: retain
members.description: Registers a disposable resource under an optional key for later cleanup.

members.name: dispose
members.description: Disposes all resources under the given key, or all resources if no key is provided.

core.name: resolveEase
core.description: Resolves an ease name or function to an `Ease` function, defaulting to `easeOutCubic`.
core.typeSignature: function resolveEase(value?: EaseName | Ease): Ease

core.name: normalizePadding
core.description: Normalizes a padding input into a `Padding` object, or returns `undefined` if no input.
core.typeSignature: function normalizePadding(value?: PaddingInput): Padding | undefined

core.name: normalizeTitle
core.description: Normalizes a title input into fully resolved `ChartTitleOptions`.
core.typeSignature: function normalizeTitle(input?: ChartTitleInput): ChartTitleOptions | undefined

core.name: normalizeAnimation
core.description: Normalizes animation input into fully resolved `ChartAnimationOptions`.
core.typeSignature: function normalizeAnimation(input?: ChartAnimationInput, defaults?: Partial<ChartAnimationOptions>): ChartAnimationOptions

core.name: normalizeGrid
core.description: Normalizes grid input into fully resolved `ChartGridOptions`.
core.typeSignature: function normalizeGrid(input?: ChartGridInput, defaults?: Partial<ChartGridOptions>): ChartGridOptions

core.name: normalizeCrosshair
core.description: Normalizes crosshair input into fully resolved `ChartCrosshairOptions`.
core.typeSignature: function normalizeCrosshair(input?: ChartCrosshairInput, defaults?: Partial<ChartCrosshairOptions>): ChartCrosshairOptions

core.name: normalizeTooltip
core.description: Normalizes tooltip input into fully resolved `ChartTooltipOptions`.
core.typeSignature: function normalizeTooltip(input?: ChartTooltipInput, defaults?: Partial<ChartTooltipOptions>): ChartTooltipOptions

core.name: normalizeLegend
core.description: Normalizes legend input into fully resolved `ChartLegendOptions`.
core.typeSignature: function normalizeLegend(input?: ChartLegendInput, defaults?: Partial<ChartLegendOptions>): ChartLegendOptions

core.name: normalizeAxisItem
core.description: Normalizes a single axis item input into fully resolved options.

core.name: normalizeYAxisItem
core.description: Normalizes a Y-axis item input into fully resolved options with position.

core.name: normalizeAxis
core.description: Normalizes axis input into a full `ChartAxisOptions` object with both x and y.
core.typeSignature: function normalizeAxis<TData = unknown>(input?: ChartAxisInput<TData>): ChartAxisOptions<TData>

core.name: resolveFormatLabel
core.description: Resolves an axis format type or custom formatter into a label formatting function.
core.typeSignature: function resolveFormatLabel(format?: AxisFormatType | ((value: any) => string)): ((value: any) => string) | undefined

core.name: EaseName
core.description: Named easing function identifiers.
core.typeSignature:
type EaseName =
    | 'easeLinear'
    | 'easeInQuad'
    | 'easeOutQuad'
    | 'easeInOutQuad'
    | 'easeInCubic'
    | 'easeOutCubic'
    | 'easeInOutCubic'
    | 'easeInQuart'
    | 'easeOutQuart'
    | 'easeInOutQuart'
    | 'easeInQuint'
    | 'easeOutQuint'
    | 'easeInOutQuint';

core.name: PaddingInput
core.description: Padding expressed as a uniform number or a [top, right, bottom, left] tuple.
core.typeSignature: type PaddingInput = number | [number, number, number, number];

core.name: Padding
core.description: Resolved padding with explicit top, right, bottom, and left values.

core.name: TitlePosition
core.description: Position of the chart title relative to the chart area.
core.typeSignature: type TitlePosition = 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right';

core.name: ChartTitleInput
core.description: Title input accepting a plain string or partial options object.
core.typeSignature: type ChartTitleInput = string | Partial<ChartTitleOptions>;

core.name: ChartAnimationInput
core.description: Animation input accepting a boolean toggle or partial options object.
core.typeSignature: type ChartAnimationInput = boolean | Partial<ChartAnimationOptions>;

core.name: ChartGridOptions
core.description: Fully resolved chart grid options.

core.name: ChartGridInput
core.description: Grid input accepting a boolean toggle or partial options object.
core.typeSignature: type ChartGridInput = boolean | Partial<ChartGridOptions>;

core.name: CrosshairAxis
core.description: Which axis the crosshair tracks.
core.typeSignature: type CrosshairAxis = 'x' | 'y' | 'both';

core.name: ChartCrosshairOptions
core.description: Fully resolved chart crosshair options.

core.name: ChartCrosshairInput
core.description: Crosshair input accepting a boolean toggle or partial options object.
core.typeSignature: type ChartCrosshairInput = boolean | Partial<ChartCrosshairOptions>;

core.name: BorderRadiusInput
core.description: Border radius expressed as a uniform number or a per-corner tuple.
core.typeSignature: type BorderRadiusInput = number | [number, number, number, number];

core.name: ChartTooltipOptions
core.description: Fully resolved chart tooltip options.

core.name: ChartTooltipInput
core.description: Tooltip input accepting a boolean toggle or partial options object.
core.typeSignature: type ChartTooltipInput = boolean | Partial<ChartTooltipOptions>;

core.name: LegendPosition
core.description: Position of the chart legend relative to the chart area.
core.typeSignature: type LegendPosition = 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right';

core.name: ChartLegendOptions
core.description: Fully resolved chart legend options.

core.name: ChartLegendInput
core.description: Legend input accepting a boolean, position string, or partial options object.
core.typeSignature: type ChartLegendInput = boolean | LegendPosition | Partial<ChartLegendOptions>;

core.name: AxisFormatType
core.description: Built-in axis label format types.
core.typeSignature: type AxisFormatType = 'number' | 'percentage' | 'date' | 'string';

core.name: ChartAxisItemOptions
core.description: Options for a single axis (x or y).

core.name: ChartYAxisItemOptions
core.description: Y-axis specific options extending the base axis item with a left/right position.

core.name: ChartAxisOptions
core.description: Combined x and y axis configuration.

core.name: ChartAxisInput
core.description: Axis input accepting a boolean toggle or a full axis options object.
core.typeSignature: type ChartAxisInput<TData = unknown> = boolean | ChartAxisOptions<TData>;

charts.name: createAreaChart
charts.description: Factory function that creates a new {@link AreaChart} instance.
charts.typeSignature: function createAreaChart<TData = unknown>(target: string | HTMLElement | Context, options: AreaChartOptions<TData>)

charts.name: AreaChartSeriesOptions
charts.description: Configuration for an individual area chart series.

charts.name: AreaChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring an {@link AreaChart}.

charts.name: AreaChart
charts.description:
Area chart rendering filled regions beneath series lines.

Supports stacked and unstacked modes with optional markers, crosshair,
tooltips, legend, and grid. Areas animate upward from the baseline on
entry and smoothly transition on update.
charts.typeSignature: class AreaChart<TData = unknown> extends Chart<AreaChartOptions<TData>>

typeParam: TData - The type of each data item in the dataset.

charts.description: Factory function that creates a new {@link BarChart} instance.
charts.typeSignature: function createBarChart<TData = unknown>(target: string | HTMLElement | Context, options: BarChartOptions<TData>)

charts.name: BarChartOrientation
charts.typeSignature: type BarChartOrientation = 'vertical' | 'horizontal';

charts.name: BarChartMode
charts.typeSignature: type BarChartMode = 'grouped' | 'stacked';

charts.name: BarChartSeriesOptions
charts.description: Configuration for an individual bar chart series.

charts.name: BarChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link BarChart}.

charts.name: BarChart
charts.description:
Bar chart supporting vertical/horizontal orientation and grouped/stacked modes.

Uses band scales for categorical axes and continuous scales for value axes.
Supports multiple series with grouped or stacked bar rendering, interactive
tooltips, legend, grid, and animated entry/update/exit transitions.
charts.typeSignature: class BarChart<TData = unknown> extends Chart<BarChartOptions<TData>>

typeParam: TData - The type of each data item in the dataset.

charts.typeSignature: function createChordChart(target: string | HTMLElement | Context, options: ChordChartOptions)

charts.name: ChordChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link ChordChart}.

charts.name: ChordChart
charts.description:
Chord diagram visualizing inter-relationships in a square matrix.

Outer arcs represent groups (labels) with angular extent proportional
to their total flow. Inner ribbons connect pairs of groups with width
proportional to the flow value. Supports legend, tooltips, and
sequential animation (arcs first, then ribbons).
charts.typeSignature: class ChordChart extends Chart<ChordChartOptions>

charts.name: createFunnelChart
charts.description: Factory function that creates a new {@link FunnelChart} instance.
charts.typeSignature: function createFunnelChart<TData = unknown>(target: string | HTMLElement | Context, options: FunnelChartOptions<TData>)

charts.name: FunnelChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link FunnelChart}.

charts.name: FunnelChart
charts.description:
Funnel chart rendering horizontally centered bars of decreasing width.

Each data item is rendered as a centered rectangle whose width is
proportional to its value relative to the maximum. Segments are stacked
vertically with configurable gaps. Supports tooltips, labels, and
animated expand-from-center entry transitions.
charts.typeSignature: class FunnelChart<TData = unknown> extends Chart<FunnelChartOptions<TData>>

typeParam: TData - The type of each data item in the dataset.

charts.name: GanttChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link GanttChart}.

charts.name: GanttChart
charts.description:
Gantt chart rendering time-based task bars on a categorical y-axis and time x-axis.

Each data item is rendered as a horizontal bar spanning its start-to-end date range.
Supports optional progress overlays, a "today" marker line, tooltips, grid, and
staggered entry animations.
charts.typeSignature: class GanttChart<TData = unknown> extends Chart<GanttChartOptions<TData>>

typeParam: TData - The type of each data item in the dataset.

charts.name: createGaugeChart
charts.description: Factory function that creates a new {@link GaugeChart} instance.
charts.typeSignature: function createGaugeChart(target: string | HTMLElement | Context, options: GaugeChartOptions)

charts.name: GaugeChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link GaugeChart}.

properties.name: tickCount
properties.description: Number of tick marks along the gauge arc. Defaults to 5. Set to 0 to hide.

properties.name: showTickLabels
properties.description: Whether to show value labels at each tick. Defaults to true.

charts.name: GaugeChart
charts.description:
Gauge chart displaying a single value on a 270-degree arc.

Renders a background track arc and an animated value arc spanning from
the minimum to the current value. Supports configurable tick marks
with labels, a central value display, and an optional descriptive label.
charts.typeSignature: class GaugeChart extends Chart<GaugeChartOptions>

charts.name: HeatmapChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link HeatmapChart}.

charts.name: HeatmapChart
charts.description:
Heatmap chart rendering a grid of colored cells on two categorical axes.

Cell color is interpolated between a configurable low/high color range
based on each data point's value. Supports x/y axes, tooltips, and
animated fade-in entry transitions with smooth color updates.
charts.typeSignature: class HeatmapChart<TData = unknown> extends Chart<HeatmapChartOptions<TData>>

typeParam: TData - The type of each data item in the dataset.

charts.name: LineChartSeriesOptions
charts.description: Configuration for an individual line chart series.

charts.name: LineChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link LineChart}.

charts.name: LineChart
charts.description:
Line chart rendering one or more series as polylines with optional markers.

Supports customisable line renderers (e.g. curved, stepped), interactive
crosshair, tooltips, legend, and grid. Entry animations draw lines
progressively while markers appear with staggered delays.
charts.typeSignature: class LineChart<TData = unknown> extends Chart<LineChartOptions<TData>>

typeParam: TData - The type of each data item in the dataset.

charts.typeSignature: function createPieChart<TData = unknown>(target: string | HTMLElement | Context, options: PieChartOptions<TData>)

charts.name: PieChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link PieChart}.

charts.name: PieChart
charts.description:
Pie chart rendering proportional arc segments with optional inner radius (donut).

Supports interactive tooltips, legend, and animated entry/update/exit
transitions. Segments grow outward from the center with staggered delays,
and labels fade in after the arcs have settled.
charts.typeSignature: class PieChart<TData = unknown> extends Chart<PieChartOptions<TData>>

typeParam: TData - The type of each data item in the dataset.

charts.name: createPolarAreaChart
charts.description: Factory function that creates a new {@link PolarAreaChart} instance.
charts.typeSignature: function createPolarAreaChart<TData = unknown>(target: string | HTMLElement | Context, options: PolarAreaChartOptions<TData>)

charts.name: PolarAreaChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link PolarAreaChart}.

properties.name: maxRadiusRatio
properties.description: Maximum radius ratio (0 - 0.5). Defaults to 0.45 (similar to pie chart).

properties.name: padAngle
properties.description: Padding angle between segments in radians. Defaults to 0.02

properties.name: levels
properties.description: Number of concentric grid rings. Defaults to 4

charts.name: PolarAreaChart
charts.description:
Polar area chart rendering equal-angle segments whose radius encodes value.

Each data point occupies an equal angular slice; the radial extent of each
segment is proportional to its value. Includes a concentric grid with
value labels, radial axis lines, and animated entry/update/exit transitions.
charts.typeSignature: class PolarAreaChart<TData = unknown> extends Chart<PolarAreaChartOptions<TData>>

typeParam: TData - The type of each data item in the dataset.

charts.typeSignature: function createRadarChart<TData = unknown>(target: string | HTMLElement | Context, options: RadarChartOptions<TData>)

charts.name: RadarChartSeriesOptions
charts.description: Configuration for an individual radar chart series.

charts.name: RadarChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link RadarChart}.

charts.name: RadarChart
charts.description:
Radar (spider) chart plotting multi-axis data as filled polygonal areas.

Renders a circular grid with concentric rings and radial axis lines,
then overlays one or more series as filled polyline areas with markers.
Supports interactive tooltips, legend, and animated transitions.
charts.typeSignature: class RadarChart<TData = unknown> extends Chart<RadarChartOptions<TData>>

typeParam: TData - The type of each data item in the dataset.

charts.name: createSankeyChart
charts.description: Factory function that creates a new {@link SankeyChart} instance.
charts.typeSignature: function createSankeyChart(target: string | HTMLElement | Context, options: SankeyChartOptions)

charts.name: SankeyLink
charts.description: A directional flow between two nodes in a Sankey diagram.

charts.name: SankeyNode
charts.description: A node in a Sankey diagram.

charts.name: SankeyChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link SankeyChart}.

charts.name: SankeyChart
charts.description:
Sankey diagram visualizing directional flow between nodes.

Nodes are positioned in depth columns computed via BFS, with heights
proportional to their total flow value. Links are rendered as curved
paths connecting source and target nodes. Supports tooltips and
staggered entry animations for nodes, labels, and links.
charts.typeSignature: class SankeyChart extends Chart<SankeyChartOptions>

properties.name: sizeBy
properties.type: number | keyof TData | ((item: TData) => number) | undefined

charts.name: ScatterChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link ScatterChart}.

charts.name: ScatterChart
charts.description:
Scatter chart (bubble chart) plotting data points as circles on two continuous axes.

Supports optional bubble sizing via a third value dimension, multi-series
rendering, crosshair, tooltips, legend, and grid. Points animate in with
staggered scale transitions.
charts.typeSignature: class ScatterChart<TData = unknown> extends Chart<ScatterChartOptions<TData>>

typeParam: TData - The type of each data item in the dataset.

charts.description: Factory function that creates a new {@link StockChart} instance.
charts.typeSignature: function createStockChart<TData = unknown>(target: string | HTMLElement | Context, options: StockChartOptions<TData>)

charts.name: StockChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link StockChart}.

charts.name: StockChart
charts.description:
Candlestick (stock) chart rendering OHLC data with optional volume bars.

Each data point is rendered as a candlestick with a body (open-close range)
and wick (high-low range), colored by direction. Supports an optional
volume sub-chart, crosshair, tooltips, grid, and animated entry/update
transitions.
charts.typeSignature: class StockChart<TData = unknown> extends Chart<StockChartOptions<TData>>

typeParam: TData - The type of each data item in the dataset.

charts.name: createSunburstChart
charts.description: Factory function that creates a new {@link SunburstChart} instance.
charts.typeSignature: function createSunburstChart(target: string | HTMLElement | Context, options: SunburstChartOptions)

charts.name: SunburstNode
charts.description: A node in a sunburst hierarchy with optional nested children.

charts.name: SunburstChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link SunburstChart}.

charts.name: SunburstChart
charts.description:
Sunburst chart rendering hierarchical data as concentric arc rings.

Each depth level is rendered as a ring of arc segments whose angular
extent is proportional to the node's value. Child nodes inherit parent
colors and are positioned within the parent's angular range. Supports
legend, tooltips, and staggered radial entry animations.
charts.typeSignature: class SunburstChart extends Chart<SunburstChartOptions>

charts.name: TreemapChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link TreemapChart}.

charts.name: TreemapChart
charts.description:
Treemap chart rendering hierarchical data as nested, space-filling rectangles.

Uses a recursive binary split layout to partition the available area
proportionally by value. Supports tooltips, auto-sized labels for
sufficiently large cells, and animated entry/update transitions.
charts.typeSignature: class TreemapChart<TData = unknown> extends Chart<TreemapChartOptions<TData>>

typeParam: TData - The type of each data item in the dataset.

charts.name: RealtimeChartSeriesOptions
charts.description: Configuration for an individual realtime chart series.

charts.name: RealtimeChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link RealtimeChart}.

charts.name: RealtimeChart
charts.description:
Realtime streaming chart rendering continuously updating line/area series.

Data is pushed incrementally via {@link RealtimeChart.push} and maintained
in a fixed-size sliding window buffer. Each render cycle smoothly transitions
polylines to reflect the latest data. Supports y-axis, grid, crosshair,
legend, and configurable transition duration.
charts.typeSignature: class RealtimeChart extends Chart<RealtimeChartOptions>

charts.name: SeriesType
charts.description: Supported series visualization types within a trend chart.
charts.typeSignature: type SeriesType = 'bar' | 'line' | 'area';

charts.name: BaseTrendChartSeriesOptions
charts.description: Base configuration shared by all trend chart series types.

charts.name: TrendChartBarSeriesOptions
charts.description: Series options for bar-type series within a trend chart.

charts.name: TrendChartAreaSeriesOptions
charts.description: Series options for area-type series within a trend chart.

charts.name: TrendChartLineSeriesOptions
charts.description: Series options for line-type series within a trend chart.

charts.name: TrendChartSeriesOptions
charts.description: Discriminated union of all trend chart series option types.

charts.name: TrendChartOptions
charts.description: Options for configuring a {@link TrendChart}.

charts.name: TrendChart
charts.description:
Trend chart combining bar and line series on shared categorical/value axes.

Renders bar series as grouped rectangles and line series as polylines with
markers on the same chart area. Supports tooltips, legend, grid, and
animated entry/update/exit transitions for both series types.
charts.typeSignature: class TrendChart<TData = unknown> extends Chart<TrendChartOptions<TData>>

typeParam: TData - The type of each data item in the dataset.

members.description: Returns the axis-aligned bounding box for this element. Override in subclasses for accurate geometry.

members.name: render
members.description: Renders this shape by creating a path, invoking the callback, and automatically applying fill/stroke or clipping.

members.name: intersectsWith
members.description: Tests whether a point intersects this shape using path-based fill and stroke hit testing.

members.name: getStateValue
members.description: Reads a state value, falling back to the parent’s value if the local value is nil (property inheritance).

members.description: Sets a state value and emits an `updated` event.

members.description: Subscribes a handler to the given event type and returns a disposable for cleanup.

members.description: Creates a shallow clone of this element with the same id, classes, and state.
